title: Bypassing the Multimodal Tax: Hybrid RAG, SQL RRF & UI Telemetry - Abed Matini, Ogilvy
summary: A practical approach to building production-grade RAG applications that minimize cloud API costs through local document processing, semantic chunking, and database-native hybrid retrieval using Reciprocal Rank Fusion. Incorporates UI telemetry and prompt-injection detection mechanisms to enhance reliability and observability.
writeup: Abed Matini of Ogilvy walks through production-scale RAG architecture patterns aimed at cutting the cost of multimodal pipelines by keeping work local. The talk covers local-first document ingestion with OCR pipelines, database-first retrieval that combines dense embeddings with sparse keyword indices through Reciprocal Rank Fusion, and client-side telemetry paired with prompt-injection validation. The throughline is cost optimization: minimizing cloud API token usage by pushing processing onto local infrastructure. Specifics referenced include semantic chunking, vector search with HNSW, and pgvector.
